\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3499 introduces Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi_{n,\ell,m}(\chi,\theta,\phi) = \Pi_{n\ell}(\chi)\, Y_\ell^m(\theta,\phi), \]
